languages.text: "Не вините себя. Такое было сложно предвидеть".

traits.locale_text: "Не вините себя. Такое было сложно предвидеть".

languages.text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"
languages.original_text: "Не вините себя. Такое было сложно предвидеть".

traits.locale_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"
"Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"
"Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

languages.text: “别自责了，没人能预料到这种结果。”
languages.original_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

traits.locale_text: “别自责了，没人能预料到这种结果。”

languages.text: « Il ne faut pas vous en vouloir. Qui aurait pu prévoir une chose pareille ? »
languages.original_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

traits.locale_text: « Il ne faut pas vous en vouloir. Qui aurait pu prévoir une chose pareille ? »

languages.text: "Kendini suçlamana gerek yok. Böyle bir sonucu kim, nasıl tahmin edebilirdi ki?"
languages.original_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

traits.locale_text: "Kendini suçlamana gerek yok. Böyle bir sonucu kim, nasıl tahmin edebilirdi ki?"

languages.text: «No se culpe. ¿Quién podría haber imaginado este final?».
languages.original_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

traits.locale_text: «No se culpe. ¿Quién podría haber imaginado este final?».

languages.text: "Macht Euch keine Vorwürfe. Wer hätte damit rechnen können?"
languages.original_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

traits.locale_text: "Macht Euch keine Vorwürfe. Wer hätte damit rechnen können?"

languages.text: 「自分を責めないで。こんな結果を誰が予測できたでしょう？」
languages.original_text: "Don't blame yourself. Who could have predicted this outcome?"

traits.locale_text: 「自分を責めないで。こんな結果を誰が予測できたでしょう？」
